papers.title_en: Medical Multimodal Large Language Models: A Survey
papers.tldr: 随着多模态大语言模型的发展，集成临床报告、医学图像和生理数据等多种模态的医学多模态大语言模型（Medical MLLM）应运而生。本文对该领域进行了全面综述，系统梳理了医学MLLM的发展历程、核心技术架构、训练策略以及在临床诊断中的应用现状，并探讨了当前面临的挑战与未来方向，为该领域的后续研究提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: In recent years, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have gradually givenrise to medical multimodal large language models (Medical MLLMs) through theintegration of multimodal data such as clinical reports, medical images, physiological …

papers.title_en: CMT-BUSNet: Adaptive Fusion-Based Triple-Branch Hybrid Architecture for Explainable Breast Ultrasound Tumor Segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究提出CMT-BUSNet，一种融合CNN、Mamba和Transformer三分支的混合架构，旨在解决乳腺超声肿瘤分割中的特征提取与可解释性问题。该模型通过自适应融合机制提升了分割精度，并内置了可解释性分析，为临床诊断提供了更可靠的决策支持，在乳腺癌早期筛查中具有重要应用价值。
papers.abstract_en: Background/Objectives: This study proposes CMT-BUSNet, a hybrid architectureintegrating CNN, Mamba, and Transformer branches for breast ultrasound tumorsegmentation with built-in explainability. Methods: CMT-BUSNet employs a CNN …

papers.title_en: Perturbation: A simple and efficient adversarial tracer for representation learning in language models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对深度神经语言模型中语言表示学习难以定位的问题，提出了一种名为 Perturbation 的简单且高效的对抗性追踪器。该方法旨在解决现有表示提取技术的局限性，通过对抗性扰动来识别模型内部的语言特征。研究证明了该方法在效率和实用性上的优势，为理解语言模型的内部机制提供了新的理论与实践工具。
papers.abstract_en: Linguistic representation learning in deep neural language models (LMs) has beenstudied for decades, for both practical and theoretical reasons. However, findingrepresentations in LMs remains an unsolved problem, in part due to a dilemma …

papers.title_en: Towards GUI Agents: Vision-Language Diffusion Models for GUI Grounding
papers.tldr: 本文研究了图形用户界面（GUI）智能体中的定位问题，针对长期由自回归视觉语言模型主导的现状，提出利用离散扩散视觉语言模型（DVLM）进行GUI接地。研究通过引入扩散机制来增强模型对界面元素的感知与定位能力，为构建更高效、准确的GUI交互智能体提供了新的技术路径和架构选择。
papers.abstract_en: Autoregressive (AR) vision-language models (VLMs) have long dominatedmultimodal understanding, reasoning, and graphical user interface (GUI) grounding.Recently, discrete diffusion vision-language models (DVLMs) have shown strong …

papers.title_en: Mitigating the Reasoning Tax in Vision-Language Fine-Tuning with Input-Adaptive Depth Aggregation
papers.tldr: 针对视觉语言模型（VLM）在视觉指令微调过程中出现的感知能力提升但推理能力下降（即“推理税”）问题，本文提出了一种输入自适应深度聚合方法。该方法通过动态调整模型深度，在增强视觉感知性能的同时，有效保留了预训练模型的逻辑推理能力，为解决VLM后训练阶段的性能权衡提供了高效方案。
papers.abstract_en: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on visual instruction data often improves perceptualcapabilities in vision-language models (VLMs) while degrading reasoningperformance, creating a persistent reasoning tax during post-training. We investigate …

papers.title_en: Learning to Predict Future-Aligned Research Proposals with Language Models
papers.tldr: 本文针对大语言模型在辅助科研构思时难以自动评估提案质量的问题，提出了一种预测“与未来对齐”研究提案的新方法。研究旨在解决创新性和合理性难以自动衡量以及人工评估成本高昂的挑战，通过训练模型预测提案是否符合未来研究趋势，为自动化评估LLM生成的科研设想提供了有效的技术框架和评价标准。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to assist ideation in research,but evaluating the quality of LLM-generated research proposals remains difficult:novelty and soundness are hard to measure automatically, and large-scale human …

papers.title_en: Memory Dial: A Training Framework for Controllable Memorization in Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对语言模型记忆机制难以隔离和控制的挑战，本文提出了 Memory Dial 训练框架。不同于传统的事后检测方法，该框架在训练阶段引入了可控机制，允许开发者精准调节模型对特定数据的记忆程度。研究通过实验证明了该方法在隔离记忆内容和提升模型预测可解释性方面的有效性，为构建更安全、可控的语言模型提供了新的技术路径。
papers.abstract_en: Memorization in language models is widely studied but remains difficult to isolateand control. Understanding when and what models memorize is essential forexplaining their predictions, yet existing approaches are post-hoc: they can detect …

papers.title_en: Thinking Diffusion: Penalize and Guide Visual-Grounded Reasoning in Diffusion Multimodal Language Models
papers.tldr: 扩散大语言模型（dLLMs）作为自回归模型的替代方案，正逐渐扩展到多模态领域。然而，在视觉定位推理任务中，扩散模型仍面临挑战。本文提出了“Thinking Diffusion”框架，通过惩罚错误推理路径并引导模型关注关键视觉特征，增强了扩散多模态大模型在复杂视觉推理任务中的表现。该方法在多个基准测试中展现了优于传统自回归模型和现有扩散模型的性能，为多模态推理提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) are emerging as promising alternatives toautoregressive (AR) LLMs. Recently, this paradigm has been extended to multimodaltasks, leading to the development of diffusion multimodal large language models …

papers.title_en: See Fair, Speak Truth: Equitable Attention Improves Grounding and Reduces Hallucination in Vision-Language Alignment
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大模型（MLLM）中常见的幻觉问题，指出其根源在于解码过程中注意力过度集中于视觉显著或高频内容。为此，作者提出了“公平注意力”（Equitable Attention）机制，通过优化视觉-语言对齐过程中的注意力分配，增强模型对视觉输入的忠实度。实验证明，该方法能显著提升目标定位能力并减少幻觉，为构建更可靠的多模态模型提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) frequently hallucinate objects that areabsent from the visual input, often because attention during decoding isdisproportionately drawn to visually dominant or frequently occurring content. We …

papers.title_en: Bringing Value Models Back: Generative Critics for Value Modeling in LLM Reinforcement Learning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型（LLM）强化学习中的信用分配难题，重新引入了价值模型。传统方法在处理复杂文本生成时难以进行细粒度的优势估计，导致学习效率低下。本文提出了“生成式评论家”（Generative Critics）方法，通过生成式建模来构建价值函数，从而实现更精准的优势估计。该方法有效提升了LLM在强化学习过程中的性能，证明了在现代LLM训练中回归并优化经典Actor-Critic架构的必要性与潜力。
papers.abstract_en: Credit assignment is a central challenge in reinforcement learning (RL). Classicalactor-critic methods address this challenge through fine-grained advantageestimation based on a learned value function. However, learned value models are …

papers.title_en: A Mechanistic Analysis of Looped Reasoning Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对通过在潜在维度循环层结构来提升推理能力的语言模型进行了深入的机械论分析。文章探讨了这种循环机制如何影响模型的内部表示和推理过程。研究发现，循环结构允许模型在有限的参数下通过迭代计算实现更复杂的逻辑推理，为理解和优化高效推理模型提供了理论基础和实证支持，是提升大模型推理效率的重要探索。
papers.abstract_en: Reasoning has become a central capability in large language models. Recentresearch has shown that reasoning performance can be improved by looping anLLM's layers in the latent dimension, resulting in looped reasoning language models …
